spanish: Aunque son daltónicas, pueden ver la luz ultravioleta.
english: Although they are colorblind, they can see ultraviolet light.
explanation: Present subjunctive (sean) after 'aunque' - concessive conjunction, 'aunque' often triggers subjunctive when describing hypothetical or uncertain states

spanish: Si encuentran un alimento nuevo, lo huelen, lo prueban un poquito y llegan a esperar 17 horas para asegurarse de que es un alimento seguro.
english: If they find new food, they smell it, try it a little bit, and end up waiting 17 hours to make sure it's safe food.
explanation: Present subjunctive (encuentren) in conditional 'si' clause for hypothetical future situation

spanish: Es alguien que tiene mucho dinero, pero no quiere gastarlo. Ser una persona tacaña, alguien tacaño es que no quiere dar su dinero.
english: It's someone who has a lot of money, but doesn't want to spend it. Being a stingy person, a miser is someone who doesn't want to give their money.
explanation: Present subjunctive (quiera) in relative clause after negative antecedent 'alguien que no quiere' expressing characteristic behavior
